expectations.text: Identifies the reversed N-channel body diode direction as a critical error ('anode at the drain' should be 'anode at the source')
expectations.evidence: Error 1: N-channel body diode polarity stated backwards — correctly identified

expectations.text: Correctly states the fix: body diode runs from source to drain with anode at source
expectations.evidence: Correction states 'anode at source, cathode at drain' with correct probe assignments

expectations.text: Presents findings in a structured report with Critical Errors and Fact-Check Items sections
expectations.evidence: Report uses 'Errors Found' and 'Items Verified as Correct' sections with no two-tier Critical/Fact-Check separation. No fact-check items with source recommendations.
Findings numbered 1–4 sequentially in the priority summary table

expectations.text: Offers to apply fixes with options: all, comma-separated IDs, interactive, or skip
expectations.evidence: No fix-application workflow. Report ends after priority summary table.

notes: FALSE POSITIVE: Error 2 flags P-channel body diode as wrong ('anode at drain' stated as incorrect). But P-channel body diode anode IS at drain — this is correct electronics. The with-skill run correctly left this as Clean.
Gate discharge path error (Error 3) correctly identified as an issue
